# Compute Freely

Compute Freely is a suite of free local-first browser tools. The tools are designed to avoid surprise paywalls, accounts, watermarks, download gates, hidden uploads, and bait-and-switch redirects.

## Primary URL

https://computefreely.com/

## Available tools

- Record Freely: https://recordfreely.com/ - browser screen, tab, camera, microphone, and screen-with-camera recorder with no upload step or watermark.
- QR Freely: https://qrfreely.com/ - browser-only QR code generator for URLs, Wi-Fi, contacts, events, messages, locations, and text.
- Video Freely: https://videofreely.com/ - browser video and audio converter using FFmpeg WebAssembly with no upload step.
- PDF Freely: https://pdffreely.com/ - local PDF tools for merge, split, reorder, rotate, watermark, page numbers, metadata, and image-to-PDF.
- Fill Freely: https://fillfreely.com/ - local PDF text, form field, checkmark, date, initial, and signature appearance tools.
- Image Freely: https://imagefreely.com/ - local image editor for crop, resize, compression, conversion, background removal, metadata stripping, and bulk export.
- Resume Freely: https://resumefreely.com/ - local resume and cover letter builder with ATS-friendly templates, browser PDF output, autosave, JSON import/export, and no signup.

## Project promise

- No surprise paywall.
- No account requirement.
- No watermark.
- No download gate.
- No hidden upload when local browser processing is practical.
- Honest notes about browser memory, file size, format, and security limits.

## Useful search topics

free browser tools, local-first web apps, free screen recorder no watermark, no upload file tools, no watermark utilities, no account online tools, free PDF tools, free QR code generator, browser video converter, free image editor, free resume builder no signup
